mapper.select: select id, username, name,avatar, password, openid, login_type, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user from employee where username=#{username}
select id, username, name, avatar, password, openid, login_type, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user from employee where openid=#{openid}

select e.id,e.username,e.name,e.status,e.avatar, r.name as role_name from employee e left join employee_role er ON e.id=er.employee_id left join role r ON er.role_id=r.id
and e.name like concat('%',#{dto.name},'%')
and e.username like concat('%',#{dto.username},'%')
and e.status=#{dto.status}
order by e.id ASC
